metadata.description: Clear Capabilities security plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: agentic-security
plugins.description: Full ASPM coverage in a Claude Code plugin: SAST, SCA (function-level reachability + CISA KEV), secrets, IaC, prompt-injection / LLM-app security, MCP / agent-tool audit, auth/authZ deep analysis, attack chains, adversarial PoC, business-logic review, toxic-combinations scoring, material-change detection, drift, SBOM (CycloneDX + SPDX), PBOM, SARIF ingest, API inventory, pipeline integrity, license policy, MTTR, auto-fix PR bundling, container scan, dep-confusion + typosquat, and 4-framework compliance (NIST AI 600-1, OWASP ASVS, PCI-DSS 4.0, SOC 2).
